data.name: cart.empty
data.value: Nothing chosen yet. Begin with any cup that calls to you.

data.name: cart.needQr
data.value: Please scan the table QR code to order.

data.name: cart.pricesNote
data.value: Prices are confirmed when you submit.

data.name: cart.seatedHint
data.value: Your seat is noted at 106/1 Nguyễn Thị Minh Khai.

data.name: checkout.bankPreviewBody
data.value: After you send the order, a transfer QR for the exact amount will appear here.

data.name: checkout.bankPreviewKeepOpen
data.value: After transferring, please keep the bank transfer screen open for staff to verify.

data.name: checkout.bankPreviewNote
data.value: Please transfer the exact amount and memo so staff can confirm faster.

data.name: checkout.bankSubmittedBody
data.value: Bank transfer was recorded. Transfer QR will be enabled in a later step.

data.name: checkout.bankTransferKeepOpen
data.value: Please keep the bank transfer screen open so staff can come verify and confirm payment.

data.name: checkout.bankTransferPendingBody
data.value: Please scan the QR code or transfer using the details below.

data.name: checkout.bankTransferStaffConfirmNote
data.value: Your order is marked paid only after staff confirm payment.

data.name: checkout.bankTransferTrackNote
data.value: After transferring, please wait for staff to confirm payment.

data.name: checkout.bankTransferUnavailable
data.value: Bank transfer is currently unavailable. Please pay at the counter.

data.name: checkout.cardPreviewBody
data.value: After you send the order, please go to the counter to pay by card. Staff will check your order.

data.name: checkout.cardSubmittedBodyShort
data.value: Please go to the counter to pay by card.

data.name: checkout.cashPreviewBody
data.value: After you send the order, please go to the counter to pay cash. Staff will check your order.

data.name: checkout.cashSubmittedBodyShort
data.value: Please go to the counter to pay cash.

data.name: checkout.counterPreviewBody
data.value: After you send the order, please go to the counter to pay. Staff will check your order.

data.name: checkout.counterPreviewNote
data.value: Your order is marked paid only after staff confirm payment.

data.name: checkout.counterSubmittedBody
data.value: Please go to the counter to pay. Staff will check your order.

data.name: checkout.counterSubmittedBodyShort
data.value: Please go to the counter to pay.

data.name: checkout.customerNoteHelper
data.value: We will try to follow your note when preparing your order.

data.name: checkout.customerNotePlaceholder
data.value: e.g. less ice, less sugar, no cream...

data.name: checkout.provisionalBillBody
data.value: This check bill is for review only and is not a paid receipt.

data.name: checkout.provisionalBillNote
data.value: This check bill is not a paid receipt.

data.name: checkout.reviewNote
data.value: Please review your items before choosing a payment method.

data.name: checkout.transferExactNote
data.value: Please transfer the exact amount and memo so staff can confirm faster.

data.name: checkout.transferQrLoadFailed
data.value: Could not load the QR code. You can still transfer using the details below.

data.name: checkout.transferUnavailableInTray
data.value: Could not load transfer details. Please call staff.

data.name: checkout.waitingCardPayment
data.value: Waiting for card payment at counter

data.name: checkout.waitingCashPayment
data.value: Waiting for cash payment at counter

data.name: errors.404Lede
data.value: The link may have changed or this table is not configured. Return to the menu to continue.

data.name: errors.503Lede
data.value: The shop is briefly maintaining systems. Please try again shortly.

data.name: errors.genericLede
data.value: We could not complete your request. Please try again or return to the menu.

data.name: errors.offlineLede
data.value: No network connection. Check Wi‑Fi and try again.

data.name: errors.sommelierEmptyPrompt
data.value: Please share a few words about how you would like to feel.

data.name: ge.cupMoment.empty
data.value: The house could not name a cup just now.

data.name: ge.duckPost.blockedBody
data.value: This round has used every reroll. The house stands by the last pour.

data.name: ge.duckPost.blockedDismissHint
data.value: Swipe down on this card once, tap the dimmed edge, or press Escape.

data.name: ge.duckPost.blockedOwner
data.value: The house keeps the final recommendation.

data.name: ge.duckPost.blockedTitle
data.value: Oh no — the duck is out of letters.

data.name: ge.duckPost.deskHint
data.value: Unhurried. One pour. No menu yet.

data.name: ge.duckPost.deskNudge
data.value: Unhurried — one cup, chosen for this table.

data.name: ge.duckPost.deskTitle
data.value: We will name one cup for this table.

data.name: ge.duckPost.r1Dim
data.value: The mail duck is crossing the sky…

data.name: ge.duckPost.r1Letter
data.value: A letter drops — listen for the landing.

data.name: ge.duckPost.r1Open
data.value: The fold opens toward your table.

data.name: ge.duckPost.r2Dim
data.value: Another pass — the duck circles once more.

data.name: ge.duckPost.r2Letter
data.value: A second envelope drops, lighter this time.

data.name: ge.duckPost.r2Open
data.value: Paper argues gently; we keep the quieter truth.

data.name: ge.duckPost.r3Dim
data.value: Last delivery — slower wings, surer hands.

data.name: ge.duckPost.r3Letter
data.value: If doubt lingers, the room votes with warmth, not noise.

data.name: ge.duckPost.r3Open
data.value: What remains is the line that would not leave the margin.

data.name: ge.group.noGuest
data.value: No cups for this guest yet.

data.name: ge.host.deskSub
data.value: 106/1 Nguyễn Thị Minh Khai — we'll read the room before we pour.

data.name: ge.host.emptyCup
data.value: Not quite right — give me another moment.

data.name: ge.host.eveningPrompt
data.value: What feeling should your cup carry today?

data.name: ge.host.loading
data.value: One moment — I'm at the bar.

data.name: ge.host.reroll
data.value: Would you like me to reconsider?

data.name: ge.host.rerollBlockedBody
data.value: I'll stand by the last cup I named for your table.

data.name: ge.host.revealLine
data.value: I think I know what belongs at this table.

data.name: ge.host.ritualErr
data.value: Something interrupted us — try once more.

data.name: ge.host.room.afternoon
data.value: The afternoon light is soft through the garden.

data.name: ge.host.room.evening
data.value: The room is slowing down tonight.

data.name: ge.host.room.night
data.value: Nguyễn Thị Minh Khai is quiet now.

data.name: ge.host.roomDefault
data.value: The room is slowing down tonight.

data.name: ge.host.wait1
data.value: The bar goes quiet for a moment…

data.name: ge.host.wait3
data.value: I'm choosing one cup for your table.

data.name: ge.host.wait5
data.value: The room is still — no rush.

data.name: ge.host.wait6
data.value: I want the quieter truth tonight.

data.name: ge.host.wait7
data.value: One last read of the evening…

data.name: ge.host.wait8
data.value: Nguyễn Thị Minh Khai is hushed tonight.

data.name: ge.host.wait9
data.value: This is the cup I'd stand behind.

data.name: ge.menuFirst.ctaSubtle
data.value: Open menu without the arrival steps

data.name: ge.menuFirst.noteSubtle
data.value: The house prefers the three paths above; your table is still saved.

data.name: ge.originLetter.failure
data.value: The cup letter did not arrive. Please try again.

data.name: ge.originLetter.invite
data.value: When you are ready — the cup awaits.

data.name: ge.originLetter.timeout
data.value: The cup letter is taking a quiet moment. Please try again.

data.name: ge.originLetter.unavailable
data.value: This cup is resting for now.

data.name: ge.ritual.ack.q1_alert
data.value: Alert and present — I hear you.

data.name: ge.ritual.ack.q1_curious
data.value: A touch curious — I've noted that.

data.name: ge.ritual.ack.q1_refresh
data.value: Sounds like an evening that wants a little brightness.

data.name: ge.ritual.ack.q2_coffee
data.value: Coffee — I'm beginning to see the direction.

data.name: ge.ritual.ack.q2_signature
data.value: A house signature — I've noted it.

data.name: ge.ritual.ack.q2_tea
data.value: Tea will be softer for tonight.

data.name: ge.ritual.deepen.2
data.value: Mình hiểu thêm một chút rồi…

data.name: ge.ritual.eveningAck.bright_lift
data.value: Sáng hơn một chút — mình nghe thấy.

data.name: ge.ritual.eveningAck.creamy_calm
data.value: Mềm và không vội — hiểu rồi.

data.name: ge.ritual.eveningAck.slow_evening
data.value: Vậy mình sẽ giữ tối nay nhẹ lại.

data.name: ge.ritual.finalPause
data.value: Để mình nghĩ thêm một chút…

data.name: ge.sommelier.connectErr
data.value: The room softened for a moment. You may try again shortly.

data.name: ge.sommelier.hostPause
data.value: One moment — choosing a cup for you.

data.name: ge.sommelier.kicker
data.value: What feeling should your cup carry today?

data.name: ge.sommelier.tasting.calibration.feel.question
data.value: How do you like the cup to feel?

data.name: ge.sommelier.tasting.calibration.flavor.question
data.value: What should lead in the cup?

data.name: ge.sommelier.tasting.error
data.value: The house could not name an origin just now.

data.name: ge.sommelier.tasting.note.writing
data.value: Annap is choosing a cup to match this note.

data.name: ge.sommelier.tasting.offline
data.value: The house could not name an origin just now.

data.name: ge.sommelier.tasting.support
data.value: From your choices, Annap is finding a cup that fits this note.

data.name: ge.sommelier.tasting.supportCurate
data.value: Annap is balancing the cup to match this note.

data.name: ge.sommelier.tasting.supportWait
data.value: One moment — Annap is choosing your cup.

data.name: ge.sommelier.tasting.titleRitual
data.value: The bar is preparing something just for you

data.name: ge.sommelier.whisper1
data.value: Take your time — there is no wrong answer.

data.name: ge.sommelier.whisper2
data.value: We are listening for texture, not labels.

data.name: ge.sommelier.whisper3
data.value: Sweetness is a mood, not a setting.

data.name: ge.sommelier.whisper4
data.value: Lift can be quiet or decisive.

data.name: guest.sommelierLite.empty
data.value: The house could not name a cup just now.

data.name: guest.sommelierLite.error
data.value: Could not suggest a drink right now. Open the menu to browse.

data.name: guest.sommelierLite.incompatibleSheet
data.value: I need a bit more data to suggest precisely. You can still open the menu or try again later.

data.name: guest.sommelierLite.offline
data.value: Cannot reach the bar right now. Open the menu or try again.

data.name: guest.sommelierLite.trayUnavailable
data.value: Open the menu to add this drink.

data.name: guest.sommelierLite.unavailable
data.value: AI suggestions are not ready right now. You can still open the menu to order.

data.name: guest.tableNotice.browseOnlyNote
data.value: You may browse the menu, but you need to scan the table QR to place an order.

data.name: home.categoriesHint
data.value: Choose a direction. We'll keep it simple.

data.name: home.heroLead
data.value: Warm cups. Clean finishes. Long aftertaste.

data.name: home.signatureSub
data.value: Balanced sweetness. Clean structure. Long finish.

data.name: home.unseatedHint
data.value: To order and follow your tray, please scan the QR at your table. For a quiet preview of the room, you may still browse the menu.

data.name: houseSelection.afterAdd
data.value: When it lands, ask what would follow nicely — a slower cup or something from the pastry page.

data.name: houseSelection.ambientListen
data.value: One moment — choosing a cup for you.

data.name: houseSelection.rerollBlocked
data.value: The house stands by this recommendation.

data.name: houseSelection.rerollSealed
data.value: The house stands by this recommendation — too many changes spoil the ritual.

data.name: houseSelection.rerollWait
data.value: Give the ink a breath before another pass.

data.name: letterRoom.earnedKicker
data.value: The house names this cup for you.

data.name: menu.backHomeAria
data.value: Return to the home screen to pick one of the three paths

data.name: menu.browseIntro
data.value: Each cup is curated for this room — scroll unhurriedly; the bar reads your pace.

data.name: menu.categorySeasonalNote
data.value: Seasonal rotation. Ask the barista for today's microlot.

data.name: menu.editorialBlack
data.value: Bright structure, quiet clarity—cups that reward a slower read.

data.name: menu.editorialDefault
data.value: Curated for this season—choose slowly; the bar follows your pace.

data.name: menu.editorialFallback
data.value: Curated for this chapter of the menu—ask the barista if two cups call equally.

data.name: menu.editorialMilk
data.value: Comforting milk-forward cups for unhurried sips and long tables.

data.name: menu.editorialSeasonal
data.value: A short letter from the season—here for a window, then folded away.

data.name: menu.editorialSignature
data.value: The cups we name aloud—steady, confident, unmistakably ours.

data.name: menu.editorialSpark
data.value: Lifted, aromatic, and brisk—when you want the room to widen.

data.name: menu.editorialTea
data.value: Leaves and stone-ground calm—soft caffeine, clean finish.

data.name: menuTray.chipPaidBody
data.value: Staff have confirmed your order. We are preparing your drinks.

data.name: menuTray.chipSubmittedBody
data.value: Staff will come to confirm your order and help with payment.

data.name: menuTray.chipSubmittedNote
data.value: You can keep this screen open for updates.

data.name: menuTray.countNone
data.value: No cups on your tray yet.

data.name: menuTray.emptyBody
data.value: Add a cup from a suggestion or the menu — it will appear here.

data.name: menuTray.emptyGuest
data.value: This guest has not chosen yet — tap a cup when ready.

data.name: menuTray.modalUnavailable
data.value: This cup is resting for now.

data.name: menuTray.paymentSuccessCelebrationBody
data.value: Staff have confirmed your order. We are preparing your drinks.

data.name: menuTray.sheetSub
data.value: Tap to review and send your order

data.name: moods.adventurous.caption
data.value: Spice, fruit, shadow—cups that change their mind mid-sip.

data.name: moods.adventurous.glimpse
data.value: You leave room for a turn in the cup — structure, then something unscripted.

data.name: moods.adventurous.line
data.value: Layers that shift; spice, shadow, and return.

data.name: moods.adventurous.prompt
data.value: adventurous bold daring spice unexpected layered

data.name: moods.adventurous.tastingDirection
data.value: We invite a braver silhouette—layers that trade places, a little theatre without raising the voice.

data.name: moods.bright.caption
data.value: Morning through glass—lifted, legible, almost audible.

data.name: moods.bright.glimpse
data.value: You seem drawn to clarity and lift — cups that ring clean rather than sit heavy.

data.name: moods.bright.line
data.value: Sunlit acidity, clean glass, a little electricity.

data.name: moods.bright.prompt
data.value: bright citrusy lifted crystalline yuzu refreshing luminous

data.name: moods.bright.tastingDirection
data.value: We tilt the room toward light: citrus oils on porcelain, a cool rim, electricity held politely.

data.name: moods.floral.caption
data.value: Perfume first, sugar in a whisper.

data.name: moods.floral.glimpse
data.value: Delicacy reads as your line — perfume held in restraint, not decoration.

data.name: moods.floral.line
data.value: Perfumed air, whispered sugar, porcelain calm.

data.name: moods.floral.prompt
data.value: floral delicate jasmine honeysuckle blossom perfume

data.name: moods.floral.tastingDirection
data.value: We draw the curtain toward petals and cool linen—soft lift, porcelain stillness, a finish that lingers kindly.

data.name: moods.focus.caption
data.value: Tea-like clarity for concentration, rain, or both.

data.name: moods.focus.glimpse
data.value: Stillness and transparency matter — a pour for reading the page as much as the flavor.

data.name: moods.focus.line
data.value: Tea-like clarity for reading, thinking, or rain.

data.name: moods.focus.prompt
data.value: quiet focus contemplative tea clean transparent filter pen

data.name: moods.focus.tastingDirection
data.value: We compose for still minds—transparent lines, rain on glass, room for thought between sips.

data.name: moods.slow.caption
data.value: Weight you can lean into; sweetness that doesn't hurry.

data.name: moods.slow.glimpse
data.value: A slower, softer arc suits you today — sweetness that stays in the room after the sip.

data.name: moods.slow.line
data.value: Round sweetness, hush, something to linger inside.

data.name: moods.slow.prompt
data.value: slow comforting warm cozy sweet gentle velvet round

data.name: moods.slow.tastingDirection
data.value: We let the air thicken gently—roundness, hush, the kind of warmth that gathers instead of announces.

data.name: order.confirmBody
data.value: The bar has received your order.

data.name: order.inProgressLine
data.value: You have an open order from this table.

data.name: order.menuChanged
data.value: The menu has shifted. Refresh the page and choose again.

data.name: order.minOne
data.value: Choose at least one cup first.

data.name: order.needTable
data.value: Please scan the table QR code to order.

data.name: order.needTableScan
data.value: Please scan the table QR code to order.

data.name: order.queuedSoft
data.value: The line softened for a moment — we will place this tray when the room is steady again.

data.name: order.serverMaintenance
data.value: The system is being updated — please ask a staff member to place your order.

data.name: order.submitFailed
data.value: We could not send the tray just now.

data.name: order.submitFailedRetry
data.value: We could not send your order. Please try again or call staff.

data.name: order.submitFailedStaff
data.value: We could not send your order — please ask a staff member.

data.name: order.submitted
data.value: The bar has received your order.

data.name: order.tableUnavailable
data.value: This table is not available just now. A host can help you find a seat.

data.name: refine.brighter.snippet
data.value: guest asks the line to lift—brighter acidity, air, glass-bright clarity

data.name: refine.less_sweet.snippet
data.value: guest prefers a drier arc—restrained sweetness, transparent finish

data.name: refine.low_caffeine.snippet
data.value: guest wishes a gentler arc of caffeine—soft evening, steady hand

data.name: refine.more_adventurous.snippet
data.value: guest invites the tray to wander further—bolder layers, curiosity, shadow

data.name: refine.softer.snippet
data.value: guest whispers for a softer, rounder mouthfeel—velvet, less edge, hush between sips

data.name: ritual.catalogErr
data.value: The parchment did not reach us; the tasting will return when the room steadies.

data.name: ritual.catalogOffline
data.value: The room is quiet — we are holding yesterday's list until the line steadies.

data.name: ritual.heading
data.value: Arrive by feeling; we'll meet you in the room.

data.name: ritual.intro
data.value: Moods are doorways—not switches. Your host reads the air, sets the tray in kind, and lets language settle the way a private tasting does: unhurried, editorial, never a catalogue.

data.name: ritual.otherDirectionsHint
data.value: Should you wish another line on the tray.

data.name: ritual.pairingEcho
data.value: A natural echo of your mood

data.name: ritual.pairingLine
data.value: Still on your line — worth reading

data.name: ritual.pairingNeighbor
data.value: A softer neighbor on the tray

data.name: ritual.readingRite1
data.value: Interpreting your palate in this light…

data.name: ritual.readingRite3
data.value: Setting cups beside the mood you chose…

data.name: ritual.shroudBody
data.value: Setting the room and drawing language from tonight's parchment—no prompts, no chatter.

data.name: ritual.sommelierDefaultOpening
data.value: We take a breath, then offer {name}—drawn from tonight's list with the same care as the bar.

data.name: ritual.sommelierFallbackOpen
data.value: The letter did not arrive—but the room still holds you. The cups at right were set to echo how you entered.

data.name: ritual.sommelierFallbackReason
data.value: We keep the tray composed until the line returns.

data.name: ritual.sommelierFallbackTasting
data.value: Choose the line that speaks first; your host will return when the connection steadies.

data.name: toast.ceremonyFromBar
data.value: From Nguyễn Thị Minh Khai to your table

data.name: track.billPending
data.value: Waiting for staff to confirm payment.

data.name: track.cancelledFallback
data.value: This order is no longer active.

data.name: track.err404
data.value: We could not find this order.

data.name: track.errSoft
data.value: A quiet moment—connection is soft. We'll try again shortly.

data.name: track.footnote
data.value: This page updates as the bar processes your order.

data.name: track.keepOpenNote
data.value: You can keep this screen open to receive updates.
